decision: Issue 1 (tab session lost on nav): refactor AgentTabsLayout to be a thin view over useTerminalManager() instead of holding local `tabs` state + rendering inline <Terminal>. Tabs derive from aiSessions; addTab->createAISession; closeTab->removeAISession; rename->renameAISession; active tab<->activeAISessionId. The persistent <Terminal> rendered by TerminalManagerProvider survives navigation (fixed-position container outside the page); tabs layout positions #ai-terminal-<id> over a container div via getBoundingClientRect, same pattern as AgentTreeLayout (page.tsx L175-253).
rejected: docker exec reattach via containerName= param: gives a fresh /bin/bash next to the running claude TUI, not the same TUI view. Worse UX. TerminalManager approach keeps the original PTY alive so no reattach needed.
evidence: connection-handler.ts L66 sessionId=randomUUID per WS; L341-395 ws.close => EOF+SIGTERM kills container in 500ms; L545-548 containerName param => docker exec new shell. TerminalManager.tsx renders persistent terminals in fixed container (L701-745).
note: Live default layout is `tree`; bug only manifests when user sets aiCodingLayout:`tabs`. Browser verify requires toggling that setting.

decision: Issue 3 (containers actions): add app/api/containers/[id]/{start,stop,restart,logs}/route.ts and DELETE on app/api/containers/[id]/route.ts. Mirror testcontainers routes: requireAuth() for mutating ops, docker.ping() for unavailable, dockerode. Remove gated behind confirm Dialog.
Issue 4 (heading padding): devcontainers root div has no padding; wrap with container mx-auto py-6 px-4 max-w-screen-2xl (matches settings). containers page has py-6 but no horizontal px; add px-4.
evidence: app/layout.tsx main has no padding; settings uses container mx-auto py-6 px-4 max-w-screen-2xl.
